title: Gooey Spicy American Carrot Stir-fry
description: An adventurous low-carb-friendly dish featuring spicy and gooey flavors with the addition of passion fruit pulp, perfect for those who enjoy a bit of adventure in their meals.

ingredients.name: 1 cup shredded carrots
ingredients.notes: Use baby carrots or julienned carrots for easy chopping

ingredients.name: 3 passion fruit pulp (from 2 medium-sized fresh passion fruits)
1 tbsp honey or agave nectar (optional)
ingredients.notes: To sweeten and reduce spice intensity, adjust to taste

instructions: Chop the carrots into small pieces and mix them with olive oil, salt, cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper. Spread evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 20 minutes until golden brown and slightly caramelized.
In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté the chopped onions and garlic in olive oil until soft and translucent.

Stir in the passion fruit pulp, honey (if using), lime juice, salt to taste, and reserved roasted carrots. Mix well and cook for another 5-7 minutes or until heated through and the mixture is glossy and gooey.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
